title: Unified Parcel Review and Executive Report Workflow

ux_decision.summary: Due Diligence is now the primary selected-parcel review workspace. Executive Report is a shortcut into Due Diligence > Report Preview rather than a separate disconnected analysis mode.
ux_decision.legacy_mode_handling: The legacy executive_print product mode is redirected to due_diligence with parcelReviewView=report for compatibility.

due_diligence_structure_changes.empty_state: Due Diligence now shows a clear no-parcel-selected instruction with disabled Report Preview and Print Report actions until a parcel is selected.

priority_review_flags.behavior: Priority flags summarize zoning availability, flood review, school assignment/capacity caveat, development activity, utility capacity caveat, and model exposure guardrails without treating missing data as confirmed risk.

report_preview_integration.component_reuse: Report Preview reuses ExecutivePrintView inside DueDiligenceReview.
report_preview_integration.context_copy_added: Executive Report uses the same reviewed parcel context shown here, formatted for printing or stakeholder discussion.
report_preview_integration.report_preview_copy_added: Executive Report generated from Due Diligence.

top_nav_behavior.shortcut_behavior: Clicking Executive Report sets parcelReviewView=report and productMode=due_diligence.
top_nav_behavior.due_diligence_active_behavior: Due Diligence is active for review/actions views; Executive Report is active for report preview.

print_action_behavior.due_diligence_print_button: Switches to Report Preview and calls window.print().
print_action_behavior.executive_report_preview_print_button: Calls window.print() from the print-preview context.
print_action_behavior.interactive_controls_hidden_in_print: Existing print CSS remains responsible for hiding app chrome and interactive controls.

documentation_updates.summary: Updated product mode wording so Due Diligence is the primary review workflow and Executive Report is a report-preview shortcut.
Updated demo flow and talking points to show Report Preview/Print Report as generated from Due Diligence.

safety_verification.source_grep_note: Prediction-related field names remain in API type definitions and aggregate internal research-status plumbing; browser smoke confirmed they are not shown as parcel-level outputs in the unified workflow.

runtime_smoke_test.selection_method: Top parcel search in desktop viewport
runtime_smoke_test.console_errors: No new workflow errors observed. Known ArcGIS label-placement and placeholder-layer warnings still appear.

remaining_known_issues: The in-app browser initially opened below the desktop breakpoint, so the top search was hidden until the browser viewport capability was set to a desktop size for smoke testing.
Known ArcGIS label-placement warnings continue to appear for draped graphics.
Known placeholder-layer warnings continue to appear for disabled mock/placeholder GIS layer definitions.
